_publications._publicationTitle: Epigenomic, genomic, and transcriptomic landscape of schwannomatosis.

_contextSnippet: gene set enrichment analysis (GSEA) of key oncogenic pathways indicated that the majority of upregulated pathways in SWNTS-SWNs relative to NS-SWNs included PIGF, VEGF, MEK, ERBB2, and SHH, while RB was the highest scoring downregulated pathway
details: Successfully identified key upregulated pathways in SWNTS-SWNs including PIGF, VEGF, MEK, ERBB2, and SHH, while RB was the highest scoring downregulated pathway
